title: AnarchyPlus
body:
**_AnarchyPlus is a lightweight anarchy-enhancing plugin that allows you to easily control gameplay progression and create dramatic server-wide moments. Disable or enable dimensions directly from the config, and automatically announce when a player claims the Dragon Egg._**

✨ Features
• Toggle The End and Nether:
  allow_end: false
  allow_nether: true

• Automatic Dragon Egg announcement:
  announcement:
    message: "%player% has claimed the Dragon Egg! The true Anarchy begins now."
    title: "CONGRATULATIONS"
    subtitle: "%player% claimed the egg"

⚡ Why AnarchyPlus?
• Extremely lightweight  
• Zero performance impact  
• Plug-and-play  
• Clean and simple config  
• Perfect for anarchy / semi-anarchy servers

📦 Configuration
All options are configurable in config.yml. No commands. No permissions. Just simple anarchy control.
